channel.title: Unseen Scars Blog
channel.description: Trauma-informed insights, emotional healing tools, and supportive resources for adults recovering from emotional neglect.

item.title: Why “I’m Fine” Is a Survival Strategy, Not the Truth
item.description: A trauma-informed look at why emotionally neglected adults default to “I'm fine” — and the hidden costs of numbing, emptiness, and self-abandonment.
